lessons.title: Pre-seeded requirements had 3 must_fix gaps in GDPR erasure, storage backup, and data-plane security
lessons.observation: Challenger found storage backup conflated LRS with backup, GDPR erasure lacked deletion boundaries, and SQL/Storage network posture was ambiguous for a PII workload
lessons.expected: Pre-seeded artifacts should pass challenger review without must_fix findings
lessons.root_cause: Template-based pre-seeding did not include data-plane specifics or GDPR operational detail
lessons.recommendation: Enhance pre-seeded templates with explicit erasure scope, backup vs redundancy distinction, and data-store firewall requirements
